name: 息, 坚, 稳, 隐

pages.title: 息: stillness recovery
pages.text: Position: recovery after disengaging. After casting 息, stand still to recover health or hunger over time.$(br2)Taking damage or moving interrupts it; you must recast to resume. It is for breathing room, not face-tanking.

pages.title: 息 tiers
pages.text: Wood 30s, every 40 ticks restores 1 hunger or 1 health$(br)Stone 45s, 36 ticks$(br)Copper 60s, 34 ticks, better saturation$(br)Iron 90s, 30 ticks, 1 hunger or 1.5 health$(br)Gold 45s, 24 ticks, 1 hunger or 2 health$(br)Diamond 120s, 28 ticks$(br)Netherite 180s, 24 ticks

pages.title: 坚: hold line
pages.text: Position: doorway, melee pressure, repeated hits. 坚 grants toughness and knockback resistance, but slows movement.$(br2)Diamond and above become steadier under repeated hits, then decay after pressure drops.

pages.title: 坚 tiers
pages.text: Wood 30s, light toughness/knockback resist/slow$(br)Stone 45s, higher knockback resist$(br)Copper 60s, adds explosion knockback control$(br)Iron 90s, full line-holding profile$(br)Gold 45s, strong but short$(br)Diamond 120s, repeated hits improve stability$(br)Netherite 180s, most stable, still slowed

pages.title: 稳: anti-displacement
pages.text: Position: cliffs, caves, explosions, ranged knockback. 稳 reduces unwanted movement rather than raw damage.$(br2)High tiers can cancel large knockback events.

pages.title: 稳 tiers
pages.text: Wood 45s, lowers knockback and sliding$(br)Stone 60s, stronger edge stability$(br)Copper 90s, lowers water push$(br)Iron 120s, combat-position stability$(br)Gold 60s, strong but short$(br)Diamond 180s, cancels 1 large knockback$(br)Netherite 240s, cancels 2 large knockbacks

pages.title: 隐: disengage
pages.text: Position: drop aggro, reposition, avoid patrols. Attacking, using items aggressively, right-click actions, or taking pressure breaks it.$(br2)Higher tiers lower detection distance and help against ranged mobs.

pages.title: 隐 tiers
pages.text: Wood 30s, reduced detection range$(br)Stone 45s, lower detection$(br)Copper 60s, better in open ground$(br)Iron 90s, can re-hide after brief disengage$(br)Gold 45s, strong but short$(br)Diamond 120s, lowers ranged lock-on$(br)Netherite 180s, most stable stealth
